name: Eggless Tofu-Pesto Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Process the tofu and pesto in a food processor until smooth.
2. Set the pie crust in a pie plate.
3. Arrange the mushrooms and tomatoes on the bottom of the crust.
4. Pour in the tofu-Pesto mixture.
5. Bake in a preheated 375°F oven for 35 to 45 minutes.
